title: Sovereign (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sovereign''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Sovereign]]''''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] belonging to [[Wilhuff Tarkin]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Sovereign-class Super Star Destroyer|'''''Sovereign''-class Super Star Destroyer''']], a model of [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]].
**[[Sovereign (Sovereign-class)|'''''Sovereign''''']], the lead ship of the ''Sovereign''-class Super Star Destroyer class.
*[[Sovereign (corvette)|'''''Sovereign''''']], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]].
*[[Sovereign (landspeeder)|'''''Sovereign''''']], a model of [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] produced by [[Korrealis Systems]].

{{Disambig}}
